title: Minion Island Erupts
description: Pages 4–8 focus on minion island erupts, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Corazon, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as corazon and Law are trapped between Marines, pirates, and Doflamingo while the Ope Ope no Mi becomes the center of the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: corazon.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Dark clouds Loom over the two!! What is Doflamingo's forecast...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's you, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's been over half a year since you took off...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Are you with law?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: DOFLA- MINGO...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: i see... well, i'm glad the two of you are safe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Someone knows

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Did you find any good doctors....?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...I thought so.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: bring law with you and come back to the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: i might be able to cure his sick-ness!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: I've acquired some information regarding the "ope ope no mi."

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Navy put it up for a huge price.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And it appears some idiot pirate who is oblivious to its true value is seeking to purchase it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The government is definitely pulling some of these strings behind the scenes, somehow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It'll be dangerous but we're going to steal it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And once we get our hands on it, we'll need to find someone with a high compatibility for it...but more importantly...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Someone I can truly trust and rely on to eat it...

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: and that person is you... Corazon!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: And with that, you'll be able to cure law's illness.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So you guys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What do you think...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: In the past they've so doggedly sniffed out our location and come chasing after us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Marine HQ's little tools...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: But over this past half year, oddly enough, the Navy haven't made any appearances...

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: The very same half year that Corazon has gone missing...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: So he's been feeding the Navy Our Intel?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Uhahaha, it may just all be a coincidence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: --I'd like to believe that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: -I'd really rather not be suspicious of...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: ...my own little brother.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Isn't this great!!! Cheer up, law!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: You're gonna live!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: to Hell with those doctors!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: All we need is the "Ope ope no mi"!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: With it, even your Amber lead sickness will be cured!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: The following

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: What is the "Ope ope no mi"...?

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: It has the ability to modify and restructure the human body!! The power to perform Miracu- Louis operations and cure even completely unknown diseases.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: ...there's no way some- thing as fake and magical as that could-!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: That's right! But it's not magic... it requires in depth, working medical knowledge!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: That's why you'd be the most suited to eat it!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Me? But Doflamingo told you to eat....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Anyone that eats two devil fruits will die...

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: Dofy said what he did because he doesn't know about my ability.

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: You and I won't ever go back to the family again!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Once I realized our journey would not be over I quickly, I came to a decision.

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: By now, doffy should have come to the conclusion that I'm a traitor.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: There was another meaning behind doffy telling me to eat the "Ope ope no mi"...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: He knows I can't disobey him...so by using me as a sacrifice he intends to gain "eternal life"! If we go back...we'll be slaughtered!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Listen!!! We're going to turn it all around on dofy!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: We're going to steal the "Ope ope no mi"!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: And then you're going to eat it!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: After your sickness has been cured, the two of us will go into hiding some- where!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Beep boop beep boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop boop bo

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Prepare to make sail. No matter what happens, we're gonna get our hands on the "ope ope no mi"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: "okak!" -!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: "Arare" it's me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Rosinate!! It's been a long time, you had me worried!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: DAMIT, GARP!! Get the hell outta here!!

summary: Minion Island Erupts advances the Dressrosa story through Doflamingo, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Corazon, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
